title: stellaris foliosa var. lusitanica
intro: Stellaris foliosa var. lusitanica, also known as the Lusitanian starwort, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Stellaris foliosa var. lusitanica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive problems and skin irritations.
